title: Markets steady as they ponder geopolitical risks and stimulus measures
section_path: Markets steady as they ponder geopolitical risks and stimulus measures
section_path_text: Markets steady as they ponder geopolitical risks and stimulus measures
summary:
Main
Rising tensions in the Middle East continue to hang over energy markets. Metals gained amid hopes of further stimulus measures in China. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-10-14 110523.png | assets/2024-10-14_markets-steady-as-they-ponder-geopolitical-risks-and-stimulus-measures_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ef8e3156474e.png
Market Commentary
Crude oil prices gained last week amid over rising tensions in the Middle East.
